Off Calendar May-05-2014 Continued To Jun-09-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Leutza for Executor.

Mr. Leutza stated that he is working on a response to the Probate Examiner's notes and that he needs a couple of days to supplement the petition. The accounting petition was continued to June 9, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
